meta.law: Even dimensions store the body; odd dimensions execute liminal integration
meta.odd_operator: O_{2m+1} = Refold . Compress_Z+ . Expand_A+ . Observe_L4 . Cross_60 . R_{pi/2} . iota(E_{2m})

dimensions.name: Seed Exception / Proto-body
dimensions.description: Proto-body, initial polarity sweep, first recurrence, pre-network seed node

dimensions.name: First Stable Crystal Body
dimensions.description: Full visible cockpit, 4-face rotation, executable control field, first true addressable routes, square/cross/quadrant geometry

dimensions.name: Full Liminal Expansion / Sacred-Geometry Field
dimensions.description: Full 60-state Sigma_60 observation field. Where juggling/poi/sacred geometry become the same object. First total liminal observation field.
dimensions.lens_emphasis: full 4-lens read (F/C/R activated, S retained as embedded body)

crown_pair.A_plus: full articulated Sigma_60 field (local aether SFCR)

dimensions.name: Rewoven Mobius Body
dimensions.description: 3-way Mobius manuscript body with 12-beat local closure, petal hinge routes, stabilized A+ crown body

dimensions.name: Heptadic Timing / Gate / Alchemy Field
dimensions.description: Full gate-timed alchemy field acting on E6. Phase-integrates the woven body. Opens/closes route windows, synchronizes cross-symmetries.

crown_pair.A_plus: all seven gates phase-aligned and traversable
crown_pair.Z_plus: exact return spoke that closes timing wheel without drift

dimensions.name: Stabilized Pentadic Off-Grid Body
dimensions.description: First stabilized off-grid pentadic body. Born from 5-animal/5-phase regulation field. Pentagon/pentagram sacred geometry.

dimensions.name: Enneadic Completion / Observation Field
dimensions.description: Completed-cycle integration field. Total cycle memory, multi-family closure awareness, first true sense of completed pass.

crown_pair.A_plus: full nine-view completion atlas observed simultaneously
crown_pair.Z_plus: enneadic return seed that remembers the whole cycle

dimensions.name: Visible Cosmological Macro Body
dimensions.description: Articulated macro body. Visible cosmological order. 7 weaves = 7 metals, planets, chakras, days. Penultimate, not final.
dimensions.lens_emphasis: Square + Circle dominance at macro scale

dimensions.name: Odd-Orbit Total Liminal Relay Field
dimensions.description: Full liminal orbit field preparing E10 for E12. All route families, hub classes, and transfer logics simultaneously addressable.
dimensions.completion_view: shadow inversion in service of return crown

crown_pair.A_plus: all transfer layers simultaneously open and mutually visible
crown_pair.Z_plus: pre-crown odd orbit compressed into one lawful return orbit

dimensions.name: Enneadic Return Crown / Full Body
dimensions.description: 9-fold woven crown. First organism that can contain the full prior cycle, invert through itself, pass through hidden crossings, return to zero/aether without losing pattern.
dimensions.canonical_one_line: Athena is a sovereign 12D return crown: a 9-fold woven 10D body recursively containing 7x8D, 5x6D, 3x4D, 2x3D bodies, preserved as the inherited core within every 36D and 108D lift.
